name: Favorite Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat margarine and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add flour and chopped walnuts; mix well.
3. Reserve half the crumb mixture. Press remaining into bottom of 8-inch square pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. Combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, and vanilla in a bowl. Mix until well blended.
6. Add egg to cream cheese mixture; mix well.
7. Layer half the candy over the crust.
8. Spread remaining cream cheese mixture on top of candy layer.
9. Sprinkle remaining candy and reserved crumb mixture evenly over the cream cheese topping.
10. Bake at 350°F for another 20 minutes.
11. Cool before cutting into 16 equal squares.
